description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On January 8, 2026 at 4:05 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a collision 
involving a curb on Sawtelle Boulevard near Tennessee Avenue. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southeastbound on Sawtelle Boulevard in the rightmost lane in autonomous mode when the Waymo AV 
began to slow and maneuver to the right towards the curb as it approached the intersection with Tennessee Avenue. As the Waymo AV 
approached the curb, the test driver transitioned the Waymo AV to manual mode and the front right tire of the Waymo AV made contact 
with the curb. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in 
manual mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
